verse_text: (Now this man purchased a field with the wages of iniquity; and falling headlong, he burst open in the middle and all his entrails gushed out.

links.context: In contrast to Peter, who repented in his sorrow (26:75), Judas is remorseful but does not repent. Suicide is not a sign of repentance but of being self-absorbed. Two accounts of Judas' suicide are given in the NT, here and in [[ACT.1:16]]-19.
